title: CRISPR Therapeutics AG (CRSP) Stock Forecast, Price Targets and Analysts Predictions
text: CRISPR Therapeutics Analyst Consensus and Price Targets. Analyst Consensus Rating: Wall Street analysts have a bullish consensus with a median price target of $77.00, ranging from $32.00 to $316.00. The consensus rating is Buy with an average price target of $72.06, forecasting a 31.42% increase in stock price over the next year. Rating Breakdown: Wall Street analyst sentiment shows 17 Buy, 9 Hold, and 1 Sell ratings from 27 analysts covering the stock. 31% of analysts recommend a Strong Buy, 31% recommend Buy, 38% suggest Holding, 0% advise Selling, and 0% predict a Strong Sell. Earnings Outlook: The market expects CRISPR Therapeutics to deliver a year-over-year increase in earnings on higher revenues when it reports results for the quarter ended March 2026. The company is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 58.3% and 58.8% per annum respectively, with EPS expected to grow by 57.5% per annum. Outlook Context: Despite some worries about competition and pricing, CRISPR has a solid financial position and the potential for significant market share and revenues in the future.
